daily_audios.title: What You Are Saying Yes To
daily_audios.excerpt: Every yes shapes a day. Intention starts by noticing where your attention is already going.
daily_audios.reflection_prompt: What have you been saying yes to lately with your time, energy, or attention? Does that pattern reflect what you actually want your days to stand for?

daily_audios.title: Choosing the Truer Pace
daily_audios.excerpt: A more intentional life usually feels less rushed, not more impressive.
daily_audios.reflection_prompt: Where are you moving faster than your values require? What would it look like to choose the truer pace today, even in one small part of your routine?

daily_audios.title: A Smaller, Clearer Promise
daily_audios.excerpt: Intention becomes believable when it turns into one honest promise you can keep.
daily_audios.reflection_prompt: What is one small promise you could make to yourself today that would bring your life into closer alignment with what matters most? Make it concrete enough to keep.
